description_long: This object depicts the head and upper face of a person with fair skin and short, wavy, dark brown hair. The hair is voluminous and styled in loose, zigzag waves that cover the entire scalp, with a natural parting near the center. The face is partially visible, showing a pale complexion, blue eyes, and a neutral expression. No visible features of a wheelchair, body, or clothing are present, and the object appears to be limited to the head region. The hair texture is stylized, with pronounced ridges and a matte finish. There are no visible accessories, mobility aids, or interactive components attached.
description: A stylized head with wavy, dark brown hair and a pale face, showing only the upper facial features. No wheelchair or body parts are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with blue eyes, pale skin, and the parted, wavy hair framing the forehead.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full coverage and zigzag texture of the dark brown hair, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, emphasizing the wavy hair pattern and volume.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view showing the hair's texture and partial side of the face, with the chin barely visible.
attribute_seating_posture: Only the head is visible, with no posture or body position discernible.
